name: Derivatives
description: Test your knowledge of differentiation rules, powers, and trigonometric functions.

questions.question: What is the derivative of the constant function f(x) = 42?
Using the power rule, what is the derivative of f(x) = x^5?
What is the derivative of the function f(x) = sin(x)?
What is the derivative of the natural exponential function f(x) = e^x?
What is the derivative of f(x) = x^2 * cos(x) using the product rule?
What is the derivative of f(x) = ln(x) for x > 0?
By the chain rule, what is the derivative of f(x) = (3x^2 + 1)^4?
If the position is s(t) = t^3 - 6t^2, what is the acceleration (s'') at time t?
